top_risks.reasons: [LLM] Matches configured high-risk list with adequate support (52 reads, >=10). Trend stable, not sharply increasing, so High rather than Critical. Recommend confirmatory RT-qPCR/amplicon sequencing.
[LLM] Matches configured high-risk list with adequate support (26 reads, >=10). Stable trend, so High not Critical. Recommend orthogonal confirmation.
[LLM] Non-phage, non-high-risk-list human enteric virus with substantial support (116 reads). Common faecal wastewater detection; rated Medium for substantial support.
[LLM] Non-phage, non-high-risk-list human coronavirus with substantial support (26 reads). Rated Medium.
[LLM] Non-phage, non-high-risk-list seasonal human coronavirus with adequate support (20 reads). Rated Medium for substantial support.
